name: io.github.tonnode/mcp
title: TONNode — TON blockchain access
description: Liteserver access to TON: balances, account state, transactions and get-methods over native ADNL.

environmentVariables.name: TON_LITESERVERS
environmentVariables.description: Optional JSON array of private liteserver entries: [{"ip":"host","port":41000,"key":"<base64 ed25519>"}]. Defaults to the public global config.

environmentVariables.name: TON_NETWORK
environmentVariables.description: Set to "testnet" to use the testnet global config.
